name: Oathbound
description: Divine spellcasters who channel their deity's power through sworn oaths. They excel at healing, protection, and combating supernatural threats that violate their divine principles. Half-caster (Herald path becomes full-caster). Paths are the Herald and the Arbiter.
favored_attributes_note: Source: '(Mind or Will) and Body'. Player picks Mind OR Will as casting modifier, plus Brawn (Body). Verify.

resources.name: Reservoir
resources.note: Half-caster reservoir; source = Soul, modifier = Mind or Will. Covenant's Herald upgrades to (2 * Tier) + SpellMod (full-caster).

feats.name: Creed
feats.description: Choose a Creed. You gain an Anathema (beliefs you must not violate) and a Boon based on your Creed. This choice (key: creed) gates many Oathbound feats.

grants.description: When you Smite a target that violates your Anathema, deal an additional 1d8 Ether or Void damage.
When you restore a target's Vitality, add an additional 1d4 healing.
When a damaging spell of yours hits, deal an additional 1d4 Void or Ether damage.
You may turn your spell damage into Arcane damage.

feats.name: Spellcasting
feats.description: Half-caster; source is Soul; modifier is Mind or Will. Reservoir = (1 × Tier) + Modifier. Start with three known tier 1 spells. Prepared spells = Modifier. Spell DC = 10 + Spell Tier + Modifier. Respite restores Modifier reservoir (minimum 3). Gain three cantrips. (Source only lists one cantrip — Radiant Dart; see rule-check.md.)

feats.name: Augur
feats.description: You gain access to smite and turn the heretics; these do not count as known spells.

feats.name: Ascendant Boons
feats.description: Once per Long Rest, invoke your Creed to manifest an Ascendant Boon for 1 minute. Effect depends on your Creed: Honor — an Aura of Ambition; allies in your Engagement or that you touch may add your Ambition die to checks (once per round). Serenity — once per round when you restore Vitality, also heal an ally in Close range for 1d4 (up to your Tier allies). Dominion — mark a target within Nearby range; attacks and spell attacks against it have Resolve. Entropy — an Aura in Close range; when you damage an already-damaged target, deal an additional 1d4 Void or Ether damage. Paradox — when you deal damage, make a Mind opposed check; on success the target's next attack against another creature is made with Strain, on a critical success all the target's attacks are made with Strain until the end of its turn.

feats.name: Creed's Echo
feats.description: Your devotion strengthens: you may perform your Ascendant Boon twice per Long Rest.
